# Foundations {#part-foundations .unnumbered}

This part establishes the vocabulary used throughout the rest of the book.
It starts with the compact math notation needed to read the diagrams and Python code, then turns raw text into token IDs.

- In @sec-ch02-notation, you will learn the vector, matrix, probability, and calculus notation used in the later chapters.
- In @sec-ch03-tokens, you will see how text becomes token IDs, and how a small byte-pair encoding tokenizer works.
